name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the skill, schemas, or pipeline
title: "[Feature] brief description"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""

## What problem does this solve?

A clear description of the limitation or gap you're experiencing.

## Proposed solution

How you'd like ArXivist to behave differently. Be specific about which stage or file would change.

## Which component does this affect?

- [ ] SKILL.md (orchestrator logic)
- [ ] Stage 1 — Paper Parser (`01_paper_parser.md`)
- [ ] Stage 2 — SIR Registry (`02_sir_registry.md`)
- [ ] Stage 3 — Architecture Planner (`03_architecture_planner.md`)
- [ ] Stage 4 — Code Generator (`04_code_generator.md`)
- [ ] Stage 5 — Notebook Generator (`05_notebook_generator.md`)
- [ ] Stage 6 — Results Comparator (`06_results_comparator.md`)
- [ ] SIR schema (`sir_schema.json`)
- [ ] Architecture plan schema (`architecture_plan_schema.json`)
- [ ] Comparison report schema (`comparison_report_schema.json`)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about.

## Additional context

Links, papers, or examples that inform this request.
